roundResult.defendingWonAce: {{teamName}} {{pointMessage}} and reached Ace! They must now defend Ace to win the game!

algorithmic.title: Pure Mathematics
algorithmic.description: Fast, deterministic, rule-based AI. No API key required. Zero latency · fully offline.

algorithmic.offlineDesc: Runs locally on your device without connection

llm.apiKeyHint: Get a free key at openrouter.ai

google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite.description: Recommended. Speed Champion (~1-2s latency). Optimized for low-latency, high-volume workloads with improved strategic reasoning and outstanding rules compliance.

x-ai/grok-4.5.description: State-of-the-art strategic and reasoning model from xAI. Outstanding tactical depth and card coordination.

deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash.description: Strategic master. High strategic depth and excellent rules compliance, though latency can vary under load.

qwen/qwen3.6-flash.description: Elite tactical engine. Flawless rules compliance, superb combo recognition, and great point preservation.
